text:
Cash flow is not a vibe. It is a number.

Gross rent minus vacancy, insurance, taxes, maintenance, and your mortgage.
What is left is your cash flow.

If that number is thin, the deal is thin.
If it is negative, the deal needs a different exit strategy.

Do not fall in love with a property before the numbers work.

Try the Deal Analyzer before your next offer.

visual.headline: CASH FLOW IS A NUMBER

text:
The 70% rule is not the whole deal.

It is a quick filter, not a full analysis.

Before you write an offer, you need five layers of numbers — not one.

Swipe to see what actually matters.

Save this before your next walkthrough.

text:
Every week, we break down a real deal number by number.

Not theory. Not a pitch.
A real property, walked through the full analysis: ARV, rehab, structure, and whether it actually works.

Deal Breakdown Weekly is how you build the instinct to know a real opportunity from a bad one.

Watch the full Deal Breakdown — link in bio.
